$comment: Retell native KB sources. We disable the native KB by default (ENABLE_RETELL_NATIVE_KB=false) and rely on the custom RAG pipeline. This file documents what would be uploaded if you flip the flag.

sources.title: GVR product disclosure (TSD definition + non-cash)
sources.text: Travel savings dollars are promotional savings that may be applied toward eligible travel through GVR. They are not redeemable as cash and are not a general cash balance. Eligible travel categories and bookings are made through the GVR member portal.

sources.title: GVR brand disclosure
sources.text: Government Vacation Rewards is a private travel-rewards membership operated by Arrivia, headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona. It is not a government agency and is not endorsed by any branch of the U.S. military.

sources.title: TCPA recording disclosure
sources.text: Just so you know, this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

sources.title: Specialist transfer policy
sources.text: Pricing, point allocations, exact dollar values, expiration dates, account-specific lookup, booking, cancellation, and refund questions must be handled by a licensed GVR specialist.
